ReleaseNotes:
Production Release 1.0.3.0

Stability & UI Enhancements:
- CRITICAL: Resolved memory crash (AccessViolationException) on Billing Page via robust WinRT interop.
- Fixed Dashboard statistics and recent sales activity loading.
- Consolidated Billing Page actions into a single 'Finish & Print Receipt' button.
- Added proper padding and vertical spacing across all main pages.
- Fixed Stock In NumberBox crashes with new DecimalToDoubleConverter.
